Nurse Emily needs to prepare a total of 3 writing prompts per group, and there are 4 groups, so she will need $ 4 \times 3 = 12 $ initial prompts. Additionally, she has 10 extra prompts to share equally among all the groups, which means each group will receive $ \frac{10}{4} = 2.5 $ prompts. Since prompts must be whole numbers, Emily will need to prepare 10 extra prompts in total. Therefore, the total number of writing prompts she needs to prepare is $ 12 + 10 = 22 $.

The library provides a variety of writing prompts that can be used to support the session, and the library also offers a collection of creative writing exercises that can be shared among the groups. The library is a valuable resource for Emily to reference when preparing the prompts for the session.

The END.
